description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden cabin with a single slanted shed-style roof made of dark, weathered planks. The front facade features a vertically planked door with a crescent moon cutout and visible metal hinges, evoking a traditional outhouse or simple rural shelter. The walls are constructed from horizontal wooden boards, framed by rough, aged timber beams. The roof overhangs the structure, providing some protection from the elements, and the wood shows signs of weathering and slight discoloration near the base. There are no visible windows, and the only entry point is the single door on the front. The overall appearance is utilitarian and functional, suitable for use as a small outbuilding or garden shed in an urban or park setting.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a slanted shed roof and a single front door featuring a crescent moon cutout. The structure is weathered and utilitarian, with no visible windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door with a crescent moon cutout and metal hinges, framed by weathered wood.
description_view_1: Rear angled view displaying the slanted wooden roof and plain back wall with horizontal planks.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the full extent of the wooden roof and the rectangular footprint of the cabin.
description_view_3: Side view showing the slanted roof and plain side wall, with no openings or features.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof with a single slope, constructed from wooden planks and featuring a moderate overhang
attribute_window_arrangement: No windows are visible on any side of the cabin
attribute_door_placement: A single exterior door is located on the front facade, slightly offset to the right
